0.details:
Happy life happy endings
Upbringing, the life of a stop sign
Livelihood in the dusty streets
What is left behind
What is up ahead
Angel or ancestor
Till we meet again
0.model_generation:
Dear Family and Friends,

I was saddened to learn of the passing of someone who embraced a happy life, believing in happy endings. Their upbringing, as steady as a stop sign, guided them through every crossroads with unwavering resolve and gentle wisdom.

They earned their livelihood in dusty streets, their hands calloused by honest work and their spirit brightened by simple joys. In moments shared, they have shown us what is left behind: laughter, kindness, and enduring generosity that will forever warm our hearts.

Now, as they walk toward what lies up ahead, may we find comfort envisioning them as angel or ancestor, watching over us with love. Though they have moved on, every step we take carries their legacy forward. Their spirit remains a guiding light for all who knew them. Until we meet again, may peace cradle their soul and guide ours.

With heartfelt sympathy,
A friend who shares your sorrow.
0.final_version:
I am saddened and happy at the same time to hear about the passing of a dear friend. Together, we shared great moments and stories to be treasured for the rest of my days. Reflecting on our upbring, life was not always easy, we found our way and made the best of what we had. Growing up in the villages always bring up the worst and the best in people. I am truly delighted to mention that your life was a true blessing from nature to humankind.

Through most of our conversation I have learnt many lessons, skills and ways of life that were not taught in school. Where you have gone to, the after life become an a great angel or an ancestor, continue to share words of wisdom with us via dreams. For us the living, tomorrow is not certain but if there is life after death. I belive we shall meat again my friend.

1.details:
Dear friend
Introductory remarks on how life has treated both of us
Purpose is to express my gratitude
Truely been a great friend tom since childhood
Long time since we had a great conversation
1.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I hope this letter finds you well. Life has taken us on winding paths over the years—some smooth and some rocky—but reflecting on my journey, I’m reminded of the countless ways your friendship has shaped me.  
We’ve known each other since childhood, and your support has meant more than words can capture.

Today I write to express my deep gratitude. Thank you for standing by my side through every milestone, celebrating my successes and lifting me during challenges. Your kindness, laughter, and genuine care have been a source of strength. Though it’s been too long since we last had a long conversation, I cherish the memories of our talks and shared adventures and quiet moments.

I look forward to reconnecting soon and making memories together. Until then, please know how thankful I am to have you in my life.

With heartfelt appreciation,  
Your friend
1.final_version:
Dear friend,

I trust by the time you read this letter all is well with you. I have been taking a good care of myself as I know how. Today I would like to express my sincere gratitude, you have been a great friend since the first day we met. Whenever I encountered troubles, misfortune, sadness you were there to help me regain my strength. Words cannot truly express how I truly feel, I hope to see you soon so we ca have a proper conversation physically.

Life has been so good to me, however, I difficult to celebrate success with none of your friends but only strangers. I would like us to schedule a day in the coming month, if it is feasible on your end, I would like to propose the last Saturday at the famous joint we liked to visit while we were young. Best regards till we meet

2.details:
It been a while since I had a meaning full chat
When are you are free for chat, preferably in the coming weeks
I have relocated due to new job to the cities
2.model_generation:
Hello,

I hope you’ve been doing well. It’s been a while since we had a meaningful chat, and I’ve been thinking about you lately. Since I recently relocated to the city for a new job, my schedule has finally settled down, and I’d love to catch up.

Are you free for a coffee or a call sometime in the coming weeks? I’d really enjoy hearing what’s new in your life and sharing how things are going on my end. The city has been an exciting change of pace, and there are a few stories I can’t wait to tell you.

Let me know when your calendar looks open, and we’ll pick a time that works. I’m flexible in the evenings and over weekends, but I can adjust to fit your availability.

Looking forward to reconnecting soon!

All the best,
2.final_version:
Hello,

I hope you’ve been doing well. It’s been a while since we had a meaningful chat, and I’ve been thinking about you lately. Since I recently relocated to the city for a new job, my schedule has finally settled down, and I’d love to catch up.

Are you free for a coffee or a call sometime in the coming weeks? I’d really enjoy hearing what’s new in your life and sharing how things are going on my end. The city has been an exciting change of pace, and there are a few stories I can’t wait to tell you.

Let me know when your calendar looks open, and we’ll pick a time that works. I’m flexible in the evenings and over weekends, but I can adjust to fit your availability.

Looking forward to reconnecting soon old friend!

Best Regard,
Old friend

3.details:
it is not good for a man to be alone, as it is written from the bible
I am happy you have truly found love
Cherrish each moment with your partner
wishing you the best in your marriage
3.model_generation: Family and friends, we stand here today to celebrate the union of two extraordinary souls. It is written, “It is not good for a man to be alone,” and today we bear witness to the beauty that emerges when two hearts find their perfect counterpart. From this moment forward, may every sunrise bring new reasons to smile, every sunset remind you of the peace you share, and every challenge strengthen your bond. Embrace laughter and tears, excitement and calm, knowing that together you are stronger than you ever could be alone. Cherish each fleeting second, for in the tapestry of marriage, it is the smallest moments—morning coffee conversations, shared glances across the room, quiet walks hand in hand—that weave the richest blessings. I am overjoyed that you have truly found love, and I wish you both a lifetime of unwavering companionship, joyous discovery, and endless devotion. To a marriage filled with hope, passion, and blissful togetherness.
3.final_version:
Family and friends, we stand here today to celebrate the union of two extraordinary souls. It is written, “It is not good for a man to be alone,” and today we bear witness to the beauty that emerges when two hearts find their perfect counterpart. 

From this moment forward, may every sunrise bring new reasons to smile, every sunset remind you of the peace you share, and every challenge strengthen your bond. Embrace laughter and tears, excitement and calm, knowing that together you are stronger than you ever could be alone. 

Cherish each fleeting second, for in the tapestry of marriage, it is the smallest moments, morning coffee conversations, shared glances across the room, quiet walks hand in hand, that weave the richest blessings. I am overjoyed that you have truly found love, and I wish you both a lifetime of unwavering companionship, joyous discovery, and endless devotion. 

Cheers: To a marriage filled with hope, passion, and blissful togetherness.

4.details:
I have wronged, without realising, my intentions were good
I was under the impression that being a friend I had to be honest with you
I admit, I ignored the pain that our conversation has caused
Kindly accept my apology
4.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I owe you a sincere apology for the pain I’ve caused. When we spoke, I believed that honesty is the cornerstone of friendship, and I thought I was doing the right thing. I admit that I ignored the pain our conversation has caused you, and for that I am truly sorry. Without realizing it, I let my eagerness to be open override my sensitivity.

My intentions were good, but I failed to recognize the impact of my words. I understand now that being a true friend means balancing honesty with empathy and respect.

Please know how sorry I am for this oversight and for any distress I brought you. I value our relationship and hope you can forgive my mistake. I promise to be more aware of your feelings moving forward and to communicate with greater care.

Kindly accept my apology.

Sincerely,  
Your friend
4.final_version:
Dear Friend,

I owe you a sincere apology for the pain I’ve caused. When we spoke, I believed that honesty is the cornerstone of friendship, and I thought I was doing the right thing. I admit that I ignored the pain our conversation has caused you, and for that I am truly sorry. Without realizing it, I let my eagerness to be open override my sensitivity.

My intentions were good, but I failed to recognize the impact of my words. I understand now that being a true friend means balancing honesty with empathy and respect.

Please know how sorry I am for this oversight and for any distress I brought you. I value our relationship and hope you can forgive my mistake. I promise to be more aware of your feelings moving forward and to communicate with greater care.

It is against this background that I seek for your forgiveness, kindly accept my apology.

Sincerely,  
Your friend

5.details:
WE HAVE BEEN TOGETHER THROUGH MULTPLE STORM
WORDS CANNOT EXPRESS HOW I REALLY FEEL
WE HUSTLE, DREAM PLAN TOGETHER
WE DO NOT HARM NO ILLTREAT ANYONE, BUT TRULY, THIS IS GANSTER LOVE
5.model_generation: I stand here, my heart loud, words falling short to describe how much I love you. We have weathered storms that tested our faith and we emerged stronger, hand in hand. I promise to hustle with you through every sunrise, to dream with you under every moon. I vow to plan our future with bold ambition and unwavering faith in us. I will guard your joy as fiercely as I protect our honor. I promise respect, loyalty, and kindness to every soul we meet, but know this is gangster love—raw, unbreakable, and real. In your laughter I find my purpose; in your strength I find my courage. Today, I give you my whole heart, my wildest dreams, my every tomorrow. Together, we are unstoppable—two forces bound by love deeper than any storm. I love you beyond words, forever and always. With you, every day is a victory I cherish.
5.final_version:
I stand here, my heart loud, words falling short to describe how much I love you. We have weathered storms that tested our faith and we emerged stronger, hand in hand. I promise to hustle with you through every sunrise, to dream with you under every moon. 

I vow to plan our future with bold ambition and unwavering faith in us. I will guard your joy as fiercely as I protect our honor. I promise respect, loyalty, and kindness to every soul we meet, but know this is gangster love, it is raw, unbreakable, and real. 

In your laughter I find my purpose; in your strength I find my courage. Today, I give you my whole heart, my wildest dreams, my every tomorrow. Together, we are unstoppable, two forces bound by love deeper than any storm. I love you beyond words, forever and always. With you, every day is a victory I cherish.
